channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Graffiti inside lift, 5th April
item.description:
Graffiti inside lift in Ospringe Court, Alderwood Road,

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Alderwood Road, Avery Hill
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and rubbish bags, 5th April
item.description:
Mattress dumped and bags of food waste outside No. 22. Attracting vermin as bags are open and food falling out. The mattress is blocking pavement access. I did a litter pick here and have put bag in own bin so nothing to collect. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Ceres Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned on street, 5th April
item.description:
Theres and abandoned car on the road. Not mot and taxes, means insurance is also invalid. Please remove
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Palewell Close, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping in Hornfair Park, 5th April
item.description:
TV flytipped.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Shooters Hill Road, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several black plastic bags, 5th April
item.description:
First noticed these bags at the end of the week. They are being ripped open and contents (which look like clothes) are spreading across the pavement.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Kelvin Road, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 24-18 Short's Gardens, London, 5th April
item.description:
Street sign is bent.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cucumber Alley, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Been abandoned on my front garden by another resident, 5th April
item.description:
This Cecile needs to be removed asap it’s been dumped by another resident who has also been arrested for aggravated burglary of my property . I want this Cecile removed asap

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willow Lane, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish scattered by the storm, 5th April
item.description:
Rubbish scattered by the storm also the Horsell Road sign is covered in moss and could need a jet wash.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Chipperfield Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 119 inch pothole on Perry St,, 5th April
item.description:
119 inch pothole on Perry St,
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 39-43 Neal St, London WC2H 9QG, 5th April
item.description:
I would like to report an issue with a street sign that is currently facing the wrong direction. As a result, it is not visible to drivers and does not effectively inform them that a right turn is not permitted.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Shorts Gardens, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: St Julian’s Farm Road SE27 about 10 yards fro, 5th April
item.description:
St Julian’s Farm Road SE27 about 10 yards from Leigham Court Road / just by streetlight column ID number 30 is a green powered coated coloured cycle hanger locker which is graffiti tagged. Please forward fixmystreet.com link to your contractor for reporting pin &, picture.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Julian's Farm Road, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 5 metre long pothole on Perry St, near Alva Glen opposite Leas Green, 5th April
item.description:
5 metre long pothole on Perry St, near Alva Glen opposite Leas Green
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Various items litter and fly tipping, 5th April
item.description:
Residents leaving litter outside without bins that is strewn across the pavement. Several cones abandoned on the street for weeks and half a mannequin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Beatty Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Perry St. This pothole has been here for over two months and need filling. as hazardous for cyclists., 5th April
item.description:
Perry St. This pothole has been here for over two months and need filling as hazardous for cyclists.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London

item.title: 10 inch pothole on Perry St, near nursery, 5th April
item.description:
This pothole has been here for two months
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 20 Short's Gardens, London WC2H 9AU, 5th April
item.description:
The stormwater drainage has been blocked for quite some time. It was reported previously, but it has not been cleaned or resolved. Please arrange for it to be cleared as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 15, Shorts Gardens, Bloomsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: So much rubbish blocking pavement access, 5th April
item.description:
Marmadon Road opposite No. 89-91. A mattress, boxes, food waste attracting vermin and not in the bag with the rest of it and animal excrement. In fact when I litter pick this road there are quite a number of bags and plastic wrap containing dog excrement. It’s not being taken home and put in the bin. It’s a biohazard ☣️

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Marmadon Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins full, 5th April
item.description:
Could the bins be emptied please?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cocksure Lane, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: White road markings missing and faded - repaint required., 5th April
item.description:
White road markings missing and faded - repaint required.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
